title: Bodybuilding model takes centre stage in Thailand
bodyText:
[{"type":"paragraph","text":"PLETTENBERG BAY NEWS - The 26-year-old Plettenberg Bay bodybuilding and fitness model Elana Jacobs has achieved a remarkable milestone in her athletic journey at the United World Sports & Fitness Federation (UWSFF) World Championships this past weekend.","html":"PLETTENBERG BAY NEWS - The 26-year-old Plettenberg Bay bodybuilding and fitness model Elana Jacobs has achieved a remarkable milestone in her athletic journey at the United World Sports & Fitness Federation (UWSFF) World Championships this past weekend."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"She secured second place in Sports Model, was the champion in Overall Bikini, and earned her professional bodybuilding card."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Her results firmly established her as one of South Africa's rising stars in international bodybuilding and mark the pinnacle of a long, transformative journey that began in her school years.","html":"Her results firmly established her as one of South Africa's rising stars in international bodybuilding and mark the pinnacle of a long, transformative journey that began in her school years."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"A global stage in ThailandThe UWSFF World Championships, held from 27 to 29 November in Pattaya, Thailand, brought together athletes from over 20 countries.","html":"A global stage in Thailand
The UWSFF World Championships, held from 27 to 29 November in Pattaya, Thailand, brought together athletes from over 20 countries."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Against this highly competitive international field, Jacobs excelled, showcasing world-class conditioning, stage presence and discipline that set her apart on the global stage."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Early sporting foundationsJacobs' passion for sport began long before bodybuilding. Growing up in Plettenberg Bay, she embraced athletics with enthusiasm.","html":"Early sporting foundations
Jacobs' passion for sport began long before bodybuilding. Growing up in Plettenberg Bay, she embraced athletics with enthusiasm."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"\"I have been passionate about sports since school,\" she said. \"When I was in high school, I was cycling for the SWD federation for about two years.\""},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Her focus shifted when she discovered CrossFit, a sport that sparked her competitive drive. She not only trained but also began coaching at the age of 16, balancing both roles for eight years.","html":"Her focus shifted when she discovered CrossFit, a sport that sparked her competitive drive. She not only trained but also began coaching at the age of 16, balancing both roles for eight years."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"A necessary turning pointThe intensity of CrossFit eventually took a toll. Persistent strain on her joints and ligaments forced Jacobs to step back. \"I realised that I had to make a change in my life and that my body just couldn't keep up with the sport.\" This difficult decision, however, opened the door to a new athletic chapter.","html":"A necessary turning point
The intensity of CrossFit eventually took a toll. Persistent strain on her joints and ligaments forced Jacobs to step back. \"I realised that I had to make a change in my life and that my body just couldn't keep up with the sport.\" This difficult decision, however, opened the door to a new athletic chapter."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Embracing bodybuildingBodybuilding offered Jacobs the balance she needed - focused training, strategic nutrition and structured preparation. Her early results were immediate: winner of her first NPC show, SA Fitness Division champion, and second place in Bikini during her dual-division debut.","html":"Embracing bodybuilding
Bodybuilding offered Jacobs the balance she needed - focused training, strategic nutrition and structured preparation. Her early results were immediate: winner of her first NPC show, SA Fitness Division champion, and second place in Bikini during her dual-division debut."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"\"I realised that bodybuilding was exactly what I was looking for all my life,\" she said. Over five years and 12 shows, she built both confidence and competitive presence. In Thailand, Jacobs delivered her strongest performance yet.","html":"\"I realised that bodybuilding was exactly what I was looking for all my life,\" she said. Over five years and 12 shows, she built both confidence and competitive presence. In Thailand, Jacobs delivered her strongest performance yet."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Off-season and what's next"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Jacobs is now enjoying a brief break in Thailand before returning to Plettenberg Bay on 5 December. \"I'll still train because I love it, but just to maintain my physique and enjoy time with my family over Christmas and New Year.\"","html":"Jacobs is now enjoying a brief break in Thailand before returning to Plettenberg Bay on 5 December. \"I'll still train because I love it, but just to maintain my physique and enjoy time with my family over Christmas and New Year.\""},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Jacobs (middle) with other competitors at the Shaye Best Classic Competition.","html":"Jacobs (middle) with other competitors at the Shaye Best Classic Competition."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Jacobs celebrates being crowned the Overall Sports Model winner at the PCA Garden Route Classic 2025.","html":"Jacobs celebrates being crowned the Overall Sports Model winner at the PCA Garden Route Classic 2025."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
